title: Use of Artificial Intelligence / Generative AI Systems

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Minnesota Government Data Practices Act, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the applicable public records laws of Minnesota I respectfully request access to and copies of records related to the use of artificial intelligence (“AI”) and generative AI systems by employees, officials, contractors, consultants, or agents of the City Of Little Canada.

This request includes, but is not limited to, records concerning the use of:

ChatGPT
Claude
Gemini
Microsoft Copilot
Perplexity AI

or any other generative AI, large language model (LLM), chatbot, or AI-assisted drafting system.

Specifically, I request:

Copies of prompts, queries, instructions, or inputs entered into AI systems by government personnel relating to public business.
Copies of AI-generated outputs, responses, summaries, drafts, analyses, or recommendations produced in response to those prompts.
Any exported chat logs, transcripts, saved conversations, or conversation histories involving AI systems used for public business.

Records reflecting:

procurement,
subscriptions,
licenses,
invoices,
contracts,
or account creation
related to AI tools.

Policies, procedures, memoranda, training materials, guidance documents, or directives concerning employee use of AI systems.

Communications discussing:

acceptable AI use,
risks,
confidentiality,
records retention,
legal concerns,
cybersecurity,
hallucinations/inaccuracies,
or disclosure obligations
relating to AI tools.
Records identifying:
which departments use AI systems,
what AI systems are authorized,
and whether AI-generated content is reviewed before public release.
Metadata or audit logs sufficient to identify:
dates of AI usage,
users/accounts,
systems accessed,
and whether records were deleted or retained.
Any records retention schedules or legal opinions concerning whether AI chats constitute public records.

For purposes of this request, “records” should be interpreted broadly to include electronic records, screenshots, emails, text files, PDFs, exports, logs, databases, shared links, attachments, and cloud-stored content.

If any portion of this request is denied, please provide:

the specific legal basis for the denial,
the specific records withheld,
and whether segregable portions can be released.

I request that records be provided in electronic format where available.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Y.  Edda Sanchez
